project.name: Hero: Michigan's Kava Scene Is Quietly Building Roots

data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark + Chill
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with warm amber and earth tones. Cozy underground bar aesthetic, soft lighting, intimate social spaces. Pacific island meets urban lounge. Warm shadows, relaxed energy, community gathering vibes.

data.label: Setting
data.description: Intimate kava bar interior with low lighting, wooden bowls, tropical plants, comfortable seating areas

data.label: Action
data.content: Cozy kava bar interior in a Michigan college town during winter evening, warm amber lighting contrasting with snowy dusk visible through frost-edged windows, wooden tables with kava shells, exposed brick wall with subtle string lights, a few people in winter layers conversing, midwest small-town warmth meets Pacific island relaxation

data.label: Negative
data.content: alcohol, beer, cocktails, drunk people, party atmosphere, bright lights, nightclub, loud, text, watermarks
